zh.lifeSummary: 當Magnus Theodor Vogelfenger於1560年6月1日出生在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 巴德 吉辛根波爾卡德洛斯瓦爾德分斯特時，他的父親Lernhard Vogelgesang40歲，母親Catharina40歲。他於1593年與Maria Wilrich在德國貝也普法爾茲結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他在德國海藍-普法爾茲茨魏布呂肯霍恩巴賀被列為vogelfänger und förster。他去世於大約1608年在德國海藍-普法爾茲茨魏布呂肯霍恩巴賀享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Magnus Theodor Vogelfenger于1560年6月1日出生在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 巴德 吉辛根波爾卡德洛斯瓦爾德分斯特时，他的父亲Lernhard Vogelgesang40岁，母亲Catharina40岁。他于1593年与Maria Wilrich在德国貝也普法爾茲结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他在德国海藍-普法爾茲茨魏布呂肯霍恩巴賀被列为vogelfänger und förster。他去世于大约1608年在德国海藍-普法爾茲茨魏布呂肯霍恩巴賀享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: Magnus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Latin byname meaning ‘great’, this was first extracted from the name of Charlemagne (recorded in Latin chronicles as Carolus Magnus ‘Charles the Great’) and used as a given name by the Scandinavians. It was borne by seven medieval kings of Norway, including Magnus I ( 1024–47 ), known as Magnus the Good, and Magnus VI ( 1238–80 ), known as Magnus the Law Mender. There are several early Scandinavian saints called Magnus, including an earl of Orkney ( d. 1116 ), to whom Kirkwall cathedral is dedicated. The name was imported to Scotland and Ireland during the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: Theodor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Theodore
meanings: From the French form of the Greek name Theodōros, derived from theos ‘god’ + dōron ‘gift’. The name was popular among early Christians and was borne by several saints.

en.lifeSummary: When Magnus Theodor Vogelfenger was born on 1 June 1560, in Waldfenster, Burkardroth, Bad Kissingen, Bavaria, Germany, his father, Lernhard Vogelgesang, was 40 and his mother, Catharina, was 40. He married Maria Wilrich in 1593, in Palatinate, Bavaria, Germany. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 5 daughters. His occupation is listed as vogelfänger und förster in Hornbach, Zweibrücken, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany. He died about 1608, in Hornbach, Zweibrücken, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Magnus Theodor Vogelfenger est né le 1 juin 1560, à Waldfenster, Burkardroth, Landkreis Bad Kissingen, Bayern, Allemagne, son père, Lernhard Vogelgesang, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Catharina, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Maria Wilrich en 1593, à Pfalz, Bayern, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est vogelfänger und förster à Hornbach, Zweibrücken, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne. Il est décédé environ 1608, à Hornbach, Zweibrücken, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.Waldfenster, Burkardroth, Bad Kissingen,: Waldfenster, Burkardroth, Landkreis Bad Kissingen, Bayern, Deutschland
de.lifeSummary: Als Magnus Theodor Vogelfenger am 1. Juni 1560 in Waldfenster, Burkardroth, Landkreis Bad Kissingen, Bayern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lernhard Vogelgesang 40 und seine Mutter Catharina 40. Er hat 1593 in Pfalz, Bayern, Deutschland Maria Wilrich geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 5 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als vogelfänger und förster in Hornbach, Zweibrücken, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland aufgeführt. Er starb um 1608 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Hornbach, Zweibrücken, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Magnus Theodor Vogelfenger è nato il il 1 giugno 1560 nel Waldfenster, Burkardroth, Landkreis Bad Kissingen, Bayern, Germania, il suo padre, Lernhard Vogelgesang, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Catharina, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Maria Wilrich nel 1593, nel Pfalz, Bayern, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 5 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come vogelfänger und förster nel Hornbach, Zweibrücken, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania. Morì circa 1608, nel Hornbach, Zweibrücken, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Magnus Theodor Vogelfengerが1560年6月1日にドイツバイエルンランドクレイス バド キシンジェンブルカルドロスワルドフエンスターで生まれた時，父Lernhard Vogelgesangは40歳，母Catharinaは40歳であった。1593年にドイツバイエルンプファルズでMaria Wilrichと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。ドイツルヘインランド-プファルズズウエイブルuクンホールンバチでの職業はvogelfänger und försterと記録されている。彼は約1608年にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズズウエイブルuクンホールンバチで49歳で死去した。

ko.Waldfenster, Burkardroth, Bad Kissingen,: 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 바드 키징 버카르드로스 월드펜스터
ko.lifeSummary: Magnus Theodor Vogelfenger(이)가 1560년 6월 1일 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 바드 키징 버카르드로스 월드펜스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lernhard Vogelgesang(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Catharina(은)는 40세였다. 그는 1593년 독일 베이른 p팔즈에서 Maria Wilrich(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 즈위브uc켄 호른바치에서 vogelfänger und förster이었다. 그는 대략 1608년 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 즈위브uc켄 호른바치에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.Waldfenster, Burkardroth, Bad Kissingen,: Waldfenster, Burkardroth, Landkreis Bad Kissingen, Bayern, Alemanha
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Magnus Theodor Vogelfenger nasceu em 1 de junho de 1560, em Waldfenster, Burkardroth, Landkreis Bad Kissingen, Bayern, Alemanha, seu pai, Lernhard Vogelgesang, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Catharina, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Maria Wilrich em 1593, em Pfalz, Bayern, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 5 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como vogelfänger und förster em Hornbach, Zweibrücken, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1608, em Hornbach, Zweibrücken, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha, com 49 anos.

ru.Waldfenster, Burkardroth, Bad Kissingen,: валдфенстир, буркардрот, ландкрис бад киссинген, беиирн, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Magnus Theodor Vogelfenger родился 1 июня 1560 г. в местности валдфенстир, буркардрот, ландкрис бад киссинген, беиирн, Германия, его отцу по имени Lernhard Vogelgesang было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Catharina, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Maria Wilrich в 1593 г. в местности пфалз, беиирн, Германия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей.  Он работал по профессии vogelfänger und förster в местности хаурнбач, звибрuккен, раинланд-пфалз, Германия. Он умер около 1608 г. в местности хаурнбач, звибрuккен, раинланд-пфалз, Германия в возрасте 49 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Magnus Theodor Vogelfenger nació el 1 de junio de 1560, en Waldfenster, Burkardroth, Landkreis Bad Kissingen, Bayern, Alemania, su papá, Lernhard Vogelgesang, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Catharina, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Maria Wilrich en 1593, en Pfalz, Bayern, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 5 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era vogelfänger und förster en Hornbach, Zweibrücken, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania. Murió aproximadamente 1608, en Hornbach, Zweibrücken, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania, a la edad de 49 años.
